meta.title: Drift & Risk Report
meta.desc: AI-generated analysis of compliance drift. Identifies which agents regressed, why, and recommended remediation — powered by Copilot.

copilot.prompt_template:
You are a compliance analyst for AI agent governance. Analyze the following evaluation results for high-priority AI agents.

Agents:
{{agents}}

Evaluation Categories (the compliance framework):
{{eval_categories}}

Evaluation Results (per agent, per category — PASS/FAIL/PENDING):
{{eval_results}}

IMPORTANT OUTPUT RULES:
- Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown code fences, no preamble.
- Start with { and end with }.
- No emojis.
- Each value is a Markdown string using - bullet points. Max 50 words per section.

{
  "drift_summary": "- <how many agents have failures>\n- <which eval categories have the most failures>\n- <overall compliance posture: improving/degrading/stable>",
  "critical_findings": "- <agent name>: <failed eval> — <specific risk in plain language, referencing EU AI Act article>\n- (one bullet per failure)",
  "remediation": "- <agent name>: <concrete next step for the compliance admin or agent owner>\n- (one bullet per agent with failures)",
  "evidence_gaps": "- <any PENDING evals and what they mean for compliance posture>"
}
